top3.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS full_name
FROM drivers d
WHERE d.driver_id IN (
    SELECT driver_id
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            driver_id,
            SUM(CASE WHEN position_change < 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS times_overtaken,
            SUM(CASE WHEN position_change > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS times_overtaking
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                lp1.driver_id,
                lp1.position - lp2.position AS position_change
            FROM lap_positions l...

WITH overtaking_events AS (
    SELECT 
        lp1.race_id,
        lp1.driver_id,
        lp1.lap,
        lp1.position AS current_position,
        lp2.position AS previous_position,
        CASE WHEN lp1.position < lp2.position THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS was_overtaken,
        CASE WHEN lp1.position > lp2.position THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS did_overtake
    FROM lap_positions lp1
    JOIN lap_positions lp2 
        ON lp1.race_id = lp2.race_id 
        AND lp1.driver_id = lp2.driver_id 
        AND lp1....
